title: Add HAL reset and retained diagnostics surface
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-h7t5.1 documents that the current HAL has no stable reset-control, retained reset reason, crash/watchdog, or diagnostic dump API, so applications would have to add board-specific hooks for those behaviors. What needs to be done: design and implement a Zephyr HAL reset/diagnostics surface covering supported/not-supported status, reboot/factory reset request boundaries, retained reset reason/watchdog/crash metadata where Zephyr or board support exists, deterministic unavailable behavior, and native_sim/qemu tests. Physical board retained-register validation, if required, must be split into a hardware Bead.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware HAL reset/reboot diagnostics slice: added HAL reset request enum, HAL-owned reset cause flags, reset diagnostics snapshot, reboot status, reset request API, reset clear API returning -ENOTSUP pending project-LICHEN-h7t5.1.1.2, CONFIG_ZTEST request capture hooks, CONFIG_HWINFO reset-cause read mapping, and deterministic CONFIG_REBOOT unavailable behavior. Added non-ztest lichen/tests/hal_reset_unavailable fixture to prove CONFIG_REBOOT=n behavior because ZTEST selects REBOOT. Updated docs/firmware-hal-contract.md to document optional CONFIG_HWINFO/CONFIG_REBOOT, warm reboot best-effort semantics, unsupported factory reset, unsupported clear, and retained crash/watchdog follow-up project-LICHEN-h7t5.1.1.1.

Validation evidence: local git diff --check passed. EC2 us-east-2a builder i-0875d1ad33af5db66 with EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr ran: west twister -T lichen/tests/hal -T lichen/tests/hal_reset_unavailable -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-h7t5-1-1-final2 --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen. Result: 8 scenarios / 16 instances selected, 14/16 configurations passed, 2 static skips, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 324 test cases executed, 108 skipped, duration 195.57s. Earlier production compile guard check ran: west twister -T lichen/apps/gateway -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-h7t5-1-1-gateway --extra-args=ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen; result 2/4 configs passed, 2 static skips, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, build-only.

Review evidence: earlier independent review passes found P2 gaps around clear support advertising, ineffective CONFIG_REBOOT=n ztest coverage, HWINFO/clear tests, and retained diagnostics scope; fixes were applied by making clear explicitly unsupported, adding hal_reset_unavailable, adding HWINFO/REBOOT matrix tests, and creating child Beads project-LICHEN-h7t5.1.1.1 and project-LICHEN-h7t5.1.1.2. Final review B reported no P0/P1/P2. Final review A reported P2 that ztest still allowed reset_cause_clear_supported=true; fixed by asserting reset_cause_clear_supported is false and clear returns -ENOTSUP, then reran Twister final2 successfully. Final review C reported closure evidence and commit staging were not yet complete; this note records the evidence, and commit staging will explicitly include lichen/tests/hal_reset_unavailable while leaving unrelated lichen/boards/renode/nucleo_wl55jc/_integration_test.resc unstaged.
Post-fix review evidence before implementation commit 8c98609f: three independent final reviews (agents 019f25d1-1eb4-7561-a07a-1da12d5ef212, 019f25d1-33df-7a92-af68-8f5557947f4c, 019f25d1-4685-7eb3-b60a-037db1a30f05) reported no P0/P1/P2 findings after the reset-cause clear assertion fix, Beads evidence update, and explicit staged commit scope check. git diff --cached --check passed before commit. Implementation commit pushed: 8c98609f hal: add reset diagnostics boundary. Remaining retained crash/watchdog diagnostics and proven reset-cause clear support are tracked by child Beads project-LICHEN-h7t5.1.1.1 and project-LICHEN-h7t5.1.1.2.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware reset/reboot diagnostics boundary; retained diagnostics and clear support split to child Beads.
